name: PAYOMATIC
description_short: PAYOMATIC is a New York-based financial services network with ~140 stores offering check cashing, money transfers, bill payment, and prepaid cards without holding periods.
description_long:
PAYOMATIC operates as New York's largest check-cashing and financial services provider, with nearly 140 locations across the Bronx, Brooklyn, Manhattan, Queens, Long Island, and the broader NYC area. The company positions itself as a one-stop financial services hub for underbanked and unbanked consumers who need immediate access to cash and financial transaction services.

The company's core services include check cashing (payroll, government, and tax checks with no holding period), business check cashing with competitive rates and same-day large payouts, Western Union money transfers to 200+ countries, money orders, bill payment for 100+ companies (Con Edison, Verizon, Spectrum, NYCHA rent, etc.), prepaid mobile reloading, and the inPOWER Prepaid Mastercard. All services are designed for immediate cash access and same-day availability.

PAYOMATIC distinguishes itself through its extensive physical footprint (nearly 140-150 stores), positioning as the largest Western Union agent in New York, no-hold-period check cashing policy, specialized business check cashing services with customizable terms, and a mobile app for account management. The company emphasizes convenience and speed as core differentiators—customers can walk in and leave with cash immediately.

As a check-cashing and alternative financial services company, PAYOMATIC serves consumers without traditional banking relationships or those seeking faster cash access than banks provide. However, customers should be aware that check-cashing fees and prepaid card fees are not disclosed on the website, and the company operates in the alternative financial services space where costs are typically higher than traditional banking. No information about APR, interest rates, or specific fee structures is provided.
pros: Nearly 140 stores across NYC area with extended hours (some open until 9-10 PM weekdays, Saturdays until 7 PM)
No holding period on check cashing—customers receive cash immediately upon deposit
Specialized business check cashing with competitive rates, generous limits, and same-day large payouts
Largest Western Union agent in New York with access to 200+ countries for money transfers
Wide bill pay network covering 100+ companies including utilities, rent, credit cards, and retail cards
inPOWER Prepaid Mastercard available exclusively through PAYOMATIC with 24/7 mobile app access
Multiple financial services consolidated in one location—eliminates need to visit multiple providers
cons: No fee transparency on website—check cashing fees, card fees, money transfer costs, and bill pay charges are not disclosed
Limited product range compared to banks—no savings accounts, loans, or investment products
Alternative financial services typically carry higher costs than traditional banking (though specific rates unavailable)
Physical location dependency—requires in-store visits; no mention of online check deposit or remote services
No information provided about inPOWER Card annual fees, monthly maintenance fees, or transaction limits
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked consumers in NYC who need immediate check cashing without holding periods
Business owners requiring fast cash access for business-payable checks with same-day payouts
International money senders and receivers needing Western Union services across 200+ countries
Consumers without traditional banking who need consolidated bill payment, money orders, and prepaid card services
diagnosis: PAYOMATIC is best for NYC residents who lack traditional bank accounts or need same-day check cashing and bill payment services. The primary caveat is that fee structures are not transparently disclosed on their website, so customers should ask in-store about check-cashing percentages, card fees, and money transfer costs before using services.
services: Check cashing (payroll, government, and tax checks with no holding period)
Business check cashing with competitive rates and same-day payouts
Western Union money transfers (send and receive to 200+ countries)
Western Union prepaid card top-ups and reloading
Bill payment (100+ companies including Con Edison, Verizon, Spectrum, NYCHA, National Grid, etc.)
inPOWER Prepaid Mastercard with mobile app
Bank debit card loading and prepaid card funding
Store locator and multi-location network access
